adminOnboarding.notifications.descriptio.defaultMessage: Keep your users informed with email notifications, web push alerts, and in-app messages. Configure these in the Notifications settings when you're ready.

adminOnboarding.services.description.defaultMessage: Expand the functionality of your server by integrating with external services. You can set up Radarr and Sonarr for automated downloads, connect to download clients and other integrations in the Services settings.

adminOnboarding.users.description.defaultMessage: Control who has access to your Plex media. You can set defaults, import existing users, manage permissions, set quotas, and change library access from the User settings.

adminOnboarding.welcome.description.defaultMessage: Streamarr is your all-in-one media server management solution. Let's get you set up with some quick tips to get started and make the most of your new server.

adminTutorial.generalSettings.descriptio.defaultMessage: General settings are where you can configure your server-wide preferences and customize the user experience.

adminTutorial.manageUsers.description.defaultMessage: View and manage your users, update their permissions, and control their access to your media libraries.

adminTutorial.onboarding.description.defaultMessage: Customize the welcome experience for new users. Create welcome slides, tutorial steps, and control how users are introduced to your server.

adminTutorial.servicesSettings.descripti.defaultMessage: Integrate with external services to expand your server's capabilities. Configure Seerr, Radarr, Sonarr, and other integrations here.

adminTutorial.tabs.description.defaultMessage: Use these tabs to navigate between different admin features. Settings, Users, and your enabled media services are all accessible from here.

appData.warning.defaultMessage: The {appDataPath} volume mount was not configured properly. All data will be cleared when the container is stopped or restarted.

cache.description.defaultMessage: Streamarr caches requests to external API endpoints to optimize performance and avoid making unnecessary API calls.

help.accountSettings.discoveryTip.defaultMessage: You can also adjust Discovery preferences from the same settings area. We recommend keeping the defaults unless you have a specific preference.

help.accountSettings.displayDesc.defaultMessage: You can customize how {appTitle} looks and behaves from your profile settings.

help.accountSettings.emailTip.defaultMessage: Keep your email address up to date to ensure you receive important account notifications.

help.accountSettings.languageDesc.defaultMessage: Change the display language of the {appTitle} interface

help.accountSettings.notifDesc.defaultMessage: Control which notifications you receive and how they are delivered. You can enable or disable individual notification channels from your profile settings.

help.accountSettings.onlineMediaDesc.defaultMessage: By default, {plexLogo} includes free content from its own streaming service (Live TV, Movies & Shows, Music). If you prefer to only see {appTitle} content, you can disable these sources.

help.accountSettings.onlineMediaStep2.defaultMessage: Toggle off Live TV, Movies & TV, and Music as desired

help.accountSettings.onlineMediaStep3.defaultMessage: Your {plexLogo} home screen will now only show {appTitle} content

help.accountSettings.plexAccountDesc.defaultMessage: Some settings are managed directly through your {plexLogo} account. You can access these via the {appTitle} Watch portal without leaving the app.

help.accountSettings.plexAccountPrefsDes.defaultMessage: Manage your {plexLogo} username, email, password, and account details

help.accountSettings.plexWebPrefsDesc.defaultMessage: Configure playback quality, subtitles, and other web player settings

help.accountSettings.profileDesc.defaultMessage: Your profile page in {appTitle} shows your account information and activity. You can access it by clicking on your avatar or username in the navigation bar.

help.accountSettings.recentActivity.defaultMessage: See your recent activity and watch history

help.accountSettings.seerrNotifs.defaultMessage: Seerr request notifications are managed separately within the Seerr app

help.accountSettings.subheading.defaultMessage: Manage your {appTitle} profile, display preferences, notification settings, and {plexLogo} account options.

help.accountSettings.toggleNotifs.defaultMessage: Toggle in-app, email, and push notifications independently

help.accountSettings.viewDetails.defaultMessage: View your account details and membership status

help.becomeMember.closedDesc.defaultMessage: {appTitle} is not currently accepting new sign-ups. If you would like to join, please reach out to an existing member or the admin team to enquire about availability.

help.becomeMember.contactAdmin.defaultMessage: You can contact the admin team at {email} to enquire about membership.

help.becomeMember.gettingInviteDesc.defaultMessage: {appTitle} is a private, invite-only streaming service. To join, you will need an invite code from an existing member. Reach out to a friend who is already a member and ask them to send you an invite.

help.becomeMember.heading.defaultMessage: How to become a member of {appTitle}

help.becomeMember.inviteHelpLink.defaultMessage: Existing members can learn how to send invites in the {link} help article.

help.becomeMember.joinStep2.defaultMessage: Enter the invite code you received and select the {button} button

help.becomeMember.joinStep3.defaultMessage: Sign in with your {plexLogo} account — if you don't have one, you can create one during this step

help.becomeMember.joinStep4.defaultMessage: Personalise your account — choose a display name, language, and configure your notification preferences

help.becomeMember.joinStep5.defaultMessage: Complete registration — your {plexLogo} libraries and access will be set up automatically

help.becomeMember.localLoginNote.defaultMessage: You can also set a local password during sign-up for an alternative way to sign in

help.becomeMember.plexRequired.defaultMessage: A {plexLogo} account is required to access {appTitle} services

help.becomeMember.subheading.defaultMessage: {appTitle} is a private, invite-only streaming service. To become a member, you will need an invite code from an existing member.

help.becomeMember.subheadingClosed.defaultMessage: {appTitle} is a private streaming service that is not currently accepting new sign-ups.

help.becomeMember.trialNote.defaultMessage: Once you have successfully joined {appTitle}, you may not invite your own friends until the {days}-day trial period has ended

help.calendar.autoUpdate.defaultMessage: The calendar is automatically updated as new content is tracked

help.calendar.navigateMonths.defaultMessage: Navigate between months to see upcoming and past releases

help.calendar.overviewDesc.defaultMessage: The {appTitle} calendar shows you upcoming releases for movies and TV shows that are being tracked by the service. This includes media that has been requested and approved, as well as content already in the library that has new seasons or episodes coming.

help.calendar.planViewing.defaultMessage: Plan your viewing around upcoming releases

help.calendar.seeAvailable.defaultMessage: See when new content will be available to watch on {appTitle}

help.calendar.selectTitle.defaultMessage: Select a title to view more details about the release

help.calendar.subheading.defaultMessage: Keep track of upcoming movie and TV show releases on {appTitle} with the built-in release calendar.

help.calendar.tmdbTip.defaultMessage: Release dates are sourced from TMDB and may occasionally change. The calendar updates automatically when dates are adjusted.

help.calendar.usingDesc.defaultMessage: Access the calendar from the navigation menu. You can browse through different dates to see what content is coming up.

help.calendar.viewUpcoming.defaultMessage: View upcoming movie release dates and TV episodes at a glance

help.cookies.essentialDesc.defaultMessage: These are required for the service to function. They include session cookies that keep you signed in and CSRF tokens that protect against cross-site request forgery.

help.cookies.howDesc.defaultMessage: {appTitle} uses cookies for the following purposes:

help.cookies.intro.defaultMessage: This Cookie Policy explains how {appTitle} uses cookies and similar technologies when you use our service.

help.cookies.managingDesc.defaultMessage: Most web browsers allow you to control cookies through their settings. You can typically find these options in your browser's "Settings", "Preferences", or "Privacy" menu. Please note that disabling essential cookies may prevent you from using {appTitle} properly, as they are required for authentication and security.

help.cookies.preferenceDesc.defaultMessage: These remember your settings and preferences, such as your language selection and display options.

help.cookies.thirdPartyDesc.defaultMessage: {appTitle} integrates with {plexLogo} for media playback and account authentication. When using the {plexLogo} web player within {appTitle}, {plexLogo} may set its own cookies subject to their privacy policy.

help.cookies.whatDesc.defaultMessage: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to the site operators.

help.devices.breadcrumb.defaultMessage: Connect to {appTitle} using your favourite devices

help.devices.gameConsoleParagraph.defaultMessage: You can also watch {appTitle} on a variety of game consoles with the {plexLogo} app.

help.devices.headerTitle.defaultMessage: Connect to {appTitle} using your favourite devices.

help.devices.pcParagraph.defaultMessage: {appTitle} is optimized for today's most popular browsers so you can watch on your PC or laptop.

help.devices.smartPhoneParagraph.defaultMessage: It's easy to watch {appTitle} from anywhere. If {plexLogo} isn't already on your phone or tablet, you can download the free app from the Apple App Store, Google Play, or the Windows Phone Store.

help.devices.smartTvParagraph.defaultMessage: Enjoy {plexLogo}'s gorgeous interface on your big screen with the {plexLogo} Smart TV app, available in most smart TV app stores, and access {appTitle} directly on-screen.

help.devices.streamingParagraph.defaultMessage: The newest generation of media players and streaming sticks offer a fast, easy, and affordable way to watch {appTitle} on your TV with the {plexLogo} app.

help.downloadOffline.downloadMediaNote.defaultMessage: An active network connection is required to access and download content. Download speeds are dependant on the device, version and network connectivity status.

help.downloadOffline.downloadMediaStep1.defaultMessage: Open and login to the {plexLogo} app on your supported device

help.downloadOffline.downloadMediaStep2.defaultMessage: Browse to the individual media item you wish to download

help.downloadOffline.downloadMediaStep3.defaultMessage: Depending on the device, locate the download icon or menu option

help.downloadOffline.downloadMediaStep4.defaultMessage: On most devices you will see an {icon} icon

help.downloadOffline.downloadMediaStep5.defaultMessage: Wait for the media to be queued and downloaded

help.downloadOffline.downloadMediaTip1.defaultMessage: You cannot currently download media on {appDomain} or on the {appTitle} app.

help.downloadOffline.downloadMediaTip2.defaultMessage: To download on PC or MAC, please ensure you are using the {plexLogo} for Windows/MAC and not Plex HTPC.

help.downloadOffline.downloadMediaTip3.defaultMessage: {appTitle} content can only be downloaded while online and connected to the internet

help.downloadOffline.downloadPlexBest.defaultMessage: For the best results and playback we recommend downloading the latest version of the {plexLogo} app.

help.downloadOffline.downloadPlexStep1.defaultMessage: Open the app store on your supported device

help.downloadOffline.downloadPlexStep4.defaultMessage: Log into the {plexLogo} app with your {appTitle} registered account

help.downloadOffline.downloadPlexTip1.defaultMessage: You can view the list of supported devices and their apps by visiting {link}

help.downloadOffline.downloadPlexTip2.defaultMessage: You are required to connect your device and {plexLogo} to the same account registered with {appTitle}

help.downloadOffline.downloadPlexTip3.defaultMessage: {appTitle} is not responsible for the {plexLogo} app or any issues that may arise from use

help.downloadOffline.subheading.defaultMessage: You can use the {plexLogo} app to download {appTitle} content for streaming offline on some supported devices such as Laptops, tablets and Mobile.

help.downloadOffline.watchOfflineNote.defaultMessage: {plexLogo} may occasionally require network "check in" for continued playback offline.

help.downloadOffline.watchOfflineStep1.defaultMessage: When no longer connected to the internet, open the {plexLogo} app on your supported device

help.downloadOffline.watchOfflineStep2.defaultMessage: Browse to the Downloads section via the menu

help.downloadOffline.watchOfflineStep4.defaultMessage: Select play and enjoy your content

help.downloadOffline.watchOfflineTip1.defaultMessage: Some media can take longer to complete downloading, please ensure success before taking offline

help.downloadOffline.watchOfflineTip2.defaultMessage: If your media is not listed in the downloads section, your media is no longer available for playback

help.downloadOffline.watchOfflineTip3.defaultMessage: Media can be downloaded more then once but not more then one device at a time.

help.downloadPlex.breadcrumb.defaultMessage: How to download the Plex app

help.downloadPlex.downloadStreamarr.defaultMessage: If you wish instead to download the {appTitle} app, check out {link}.

help.downloadPlex.notRequired.defaultMessage: Downloading the {plexLogo} app is not required to stream content directly from {appTitle}.

help.downloadPlex.offlineRequired.defaultMessage: Downloading content to watch offline, such as when on an airplane, the {plexLogo} app is required.

help.downloadPlex.step1.defaultMessage: Head on over to {link} and choose your preferred device

help.downloadPlex.step2.defaultMessage: If there is a download link available, select it and follow the prompts

help.downloadPlex.step3.defaultMessage: If there is no download, follow the instructions provided to locate and install the app on the desired platform

help.downloadPlex.subheading.defaultMessage: Although the {plexLogo} app is not required to use {appTitle}, on certain devices such as smart TVs or game systems it may offer a better experience. help.downloadStreamarr.safari.webAppTip.defaultMessage: Your new web app will appear in the next available space on your device's home screen. If you tap it and you're kicked back to the standard website, force quit Safari, then launch the web app again.

help.invites.adminUnlimited.defaultMessage: As an admin, you have unlimited invites.

help.invites.breadcrumb.defaultMessage: How to invite your friends to {appTitle}

help.invites.generated.defaultMessage: Invite codes are generated from your {appTitle} dashboard

help.invites.heading.defaultMessage: How to invite your friends to {appTitle}

help.invites.howDesc.defaultMessage: {appTitle} uses an invite system to manage new members. Existing members can generate invite codes that allow friends and family to join the service.

help.invites.linked.defaultMessage: When someone uses your invite code, they will be linked to your account as the inviting member

help.invites.noLimitsDesc.defaultMessage: There are currently no invite limits configured on {appTitle}.

help.invites.redeemDesc.defaultMessage: If you've received an invite code or link from an existing member, head to the {appTitle} sign-up page to create your account. For a full walkthrough of the sign-up process, see {link}.

help.invites.signUpDisabled.defaultMessage: Sign-up is currently closed on {appTitle}. Invites are not available at this time. If you believe this is an error, please contact the server admin.

help.invites.singleUse.defaultMessage: Each invite code can only be used once and may have an expiry date

help.invites.step1.defaultMessage: Sign in to {appTitle} and navigate to the Invites section

help.invites.step2.defaultMessage: Click the button to generate a new invite code

help.invites.step3.defaultMessage: Share the invite code or link with the person you would like to invite

help.invites.subheading.defaultMessage: Learn how to invite friends and family to {appTitle}, and how to redeem an invite code you've received.

help.invites.trialNote.defaultMessage: Members in a trial period may not be able to send invites until the trial has ended.

help.invites.usageLimit.defaultMessage: Each invite code can be used by {usage, plural, =0 {unlimited members} one {1 member} other {{usage} members}}

help.invites.userQuotaDesc.defaultMessage: You are limited to {limit} {limit, plural, one {invite} other {invites}}{period}.

help.invites.yourUsage.defaultMessage: You have sent {sent} {sent, plural, one {invite} other {invites}} so far ({redeemed} redeemed).

help.manageAccount.heading.defaultMessage: Topics related to managing your {appTitle} account

help.manageAccount.subheading.defaultMessage: Learn how to manage your account settings, preferences, and personalise your {appTitle} experience.

help.notifications.emailDesc.defaultMessage: Important updates may be sent to the email address associated with your account.

help.notifications.inAppDesc.defaultMessage: Notifications appear directly within {appTitle} via the bell icon in the navigation bar.

help.notifications.managingDesc.defaultMessage: You can manage your {appTitle} notification preferences from your profile settings. Seerr notification preferences can be managed from within the Seerr app under your user settings.

help.notifications.pushDesc.defaultMessage: If you have installed the {appTitle} app (PWA), you can receive browser push notifications even when the app is not open.

help.notifications.pushTip.defaultMessage: For push notifications to work, you need to grant notification permissions in your browser when prompted.

help.notifications.seerrDesc.defaultMessage: When you make media requests through Seerr, you can receive notifications about the status of your requests — such as when they are approved, declined, or when the media becomes available.

help.notifications.seerrDiscordDesc.defaultMessage: Notifications sent to a Discord channel via webhook.

help.notifications.seerrEmailDesc.defaultMessage: Email notifications for request status changes.

help.notifications.seerrPushDesc.defaultMessage: Browser push notifications for request updates.

help.notifications.seerrPushoverDesc.defaultMessage: Notifications sent via the Pushover service.

help.notifications.seerrSlackDesc.defaultMessage: Notifications sent to a Slack channel via webhook.

help.notifications.streamarrDesc.defaultMessage: {appTitle} can send you notifications to keep you informed about your account activity, invite updates, and important announcements. These are managed by the {appTitle} admin.

help.notifications.subheading.defaultMessage: Stay informed about your {appTitle} account activity and media request updates through various notification channels.

help.passwordReset.localDesc.defaultMessage: If you set a local password during sign-up, you can update it from your {link}. Your local password is separate from your {plexLogo} password and is used only for signing in to {appTitle} directly.

help.passwordReset.resetDesc.defaultMessage: Your {appTitle} account uses your {plexLogo} credentials for authentication. To reset your password, you will need to do so through {plexLogo}.

help.passwordReset.securityTip1.defaultMessage: Use a strong, unique password that you don't use on other services

help.passwordReset.securityTip2.defaultMessage: Enable two-factor authentication (2FA) on your {plexLogo} account for extra security

help.passwordReset.securityTip3.defaultMessage: Never share your password or invite codes publicly

help.passwordReset.step2.defaultMessage: Enter the email address associated with your account

help.passwordReset.step3.defaultMessage: Follow the instructions in the password reset email

help.passwordReset.step4.defaultMessage: Once your {plexLogo} password has been updated, you can sign in to {appTitle} with your new credentials

help.passwordReset.subheading.defaultMessage: Learn how to reset your password and keep your {appTitle} account secure.

help.plexWeb.autoQuality.defaultMessage: Playback quality automatically adjusts to your internet connection

help.plexWeb.browseGenre.defaultMessage: Browse by genre, collection, or recently added content

help.plexWeb.browseLibrary.defaultMessage: Browse your full library of movies, TV shows, and music

help.plexWeb.browserTip.defaultMessage: For the best playback experience, use a modern browser such as Chrome, Firefox, Edge, or Safari. A stable internet connection of at least 3 Mbps is recommended for HD content.

help.plexWeb.browsingDesc.defaultMessage: You can browse all available content directly from {appTitle} using the built-in {plex} Web player. This is the same experience as visiting {plex} directly, but integrated into {appTitle} for convenience.

help.plexWeb.manualQuality.defaultMessage: You can manually adjust quality settings from the player controls

help.plexWeb.playbackDesc.defaultMessage: Select any title to view its details, then click play to start streaming. The {plex} web player supports playback directly in your browser without needing any additional apps.

help.plexWeb.searchTitles.defaultMessage: Use the search bar to find specific titles

help.plexWeb.subheading.defaultMessage: Browse and stream your entire {appTitle} library directly from your browser using the built-in Plex Web player.

help.plexWeb.subtitles.defaultMessage: Subtitles and audio tracks can be changed during playback

help.plexWeb.watchlist.defaultMessage: Access your watchlist and continue watching

help.preReleaseWarning.defaultMessage: This is beta software and currently under active development. If you encounter issues please try again or reach out on GitHub for further assistance or check GitHub for status updates.

help.privacy.autoDesc.defaultMessage: Basic usage data such as what you watch, device information, IP address (for general location), and standard web server logs. This helps us keep things running and improve the experience.

help.privacy.collectIntro.defaultMessage: We receive and store information about you such as:

help.privacy.contactDesc.defaultMessage: If you have questions about your account, visit our help center at {helpLink}. For privacy-specific questions, reach out at {emailLink}.

help.privacy.cookiesDesc.defaultMessage: We use cookies to keep you signed in and remember your preferences. For full details, see our {link}.

help.privacy.intro.defaultMessage: This Privacy Statement explains how {appTitle} handles your information. We keep things simple — we collect only what we need to make the service work, and we do not sell your data. Ever.

help.privacy.providedDesc.defaultMessage: Your name and email address when you create an account, and any preferences or requests you submit through the service.

help.privacy.use1.defaultMessage: To keep your account working and secure

help.privacy.use2.defaultMessage: To personalize your experience and provide recommendations

help.privacy.use3.defaultMessage: To communicate with you about your account, requests, and service updates

help.privacy.use4.defaultMessage: To troubleshoot issues and improve the service

help.privacy.useIntro.defaultMessage: We use your information to provide and improve the service. Specifically:

help.quickStart.disableOnlineMedia.defaultMessage: Navigate to Account Settings → Online Media Sources and disable Live TV, Movies & TV, and Music

help.quickStart.discoveryNote.defaultMessage: You can also adjust your Discovery preferences, though we recommend leaving these on their defaults

help.quickStart.firstDesc.defaultMessage: Once you have an invite code, head to the {appTitle} sign-up page and enter it. You'll be asked to sign in with your {plexLogo} account (or create one if you don't have one yet). After authenticating, you can personalise your account settings — choose a display name, language, and set up your notification preferences. Once complete, your {plexLogo} library access is configured automatically.

help.quickStart.lastDesc.defaultMessage: You're all set! Browse the library, download the {plexLogo} app on your devices, and start watching. {seerrNote}

help.quickStart.reorderTip.defaultMessage: You can reorder the libraries in your {plexLogo} app so they appear on the home page in your preferred order.

help.quickStart.secondDesc.defaultMessage: After signing up, the {appTitle} libraries are automatically added to your {plexLogo} account — no need to accept any invites or pin libraries manually. Sign in to {appTitle} or the {plexLogo2} app to start browsing the available content.

help.quickStart.seerrNote.defaultMessage: If something is missing, use Seerr to request it.

help.quickStart.settingsLink.defaultMessage: For more details on account settings, see the {link} help article.

help.quickStart.signupTip.defaultMessage: For a detailed walkthrough of the sign-up process, see the {link} help article.

help.quickStart.subheading.defaultMessage: A simple guide to getting set up and watching in minutes.

help.quickStart.thirdDesc.defaultMessage: By default, {plexLogo} may show additional content from its own free streaming service alongside {appTitle} content. If you'd prefer to only see {appTitle2} content, you can disable these in your account settings.

help.quickStart.trialNote.defaultMessage: You won't be able to invite friends during your {days}-day trial period.

help.reportingIssues.breadcrumb.defaultMessage: How can I report an issue with {appTitle} content?

help.reportingIssues.detailNote.defaultMessage: For the quickest resolution please ensure all fields are accurate and complete. Provide as much detail as possible.

help.reportingIssues.heading.defaultMessage: How can I report an issue with {appTitle} content?

help.reportingIssues.privacyNote.defaultMessage: Issues reported are not visible to others and only yourself and the {appTitle} admin team have access.

help.reportingIssues.step1.defaultMessage: Open your {appTitle} account and browse to Seerr

help.reportingIssues.step2.defaultMessage: Search for or browse to the media you wish to report

help.reportingIssues.step3.defaultMessage: On the Movie or TV Shows discovery page, locate the {icon} icon

help.reportingIssues.step4.defaultMessage: Complete the form with as much detail as possible

help.reportingIssues.step5.defaultMessage: Click submit issue and close the form

help.reportingIssues.subheading.defaultMessage: You can use the Seerr app to report issues with missing or incomplete media as well as issues or difficulty you experience with playback on certain devices.

help.reportingIssues.tip1.defaultMessage: For playback issues please ensure you select video, audio, or subtitle

help.reportingIssues.tip2.defaultMessage: If media is missing please select other and describe what or how much is missing

help.reportingIssues.tip3.defaultMessage: Do not forget to select Season and Episode numbers for shows

help.reportingIssues.trackStep1.defaultMessage: Open your {appTitle} account and browse to Seerr

help.reportingIssues.trackStep2.defaultMessage: from the menu options select Issues

help.reportingIssues.trackStep3.defaultMessage: You can filter all, open or resolved issues

help.reportingIssues.trackStep4.defaultMessage: Select View Issue to review information submitted

help.reportingIssues.trackTip1.defaultMessage: Comments may sometimes be entered asking for further information or to provide updates

help.reportingIssues.trackTip2.defaultMessage: All issues have a report number associated for clarity and tracking

help.reportingIssues.trackTip3.defaultMessage: Further questions can be submitted within each issue

help.requesting.discoverDesc.defaultMessage: Seerr helps you find media you want to watch. With inline recommendations and suggestions, you will find yourself deeper and deeper in a rabbit hole of content you never knew you just had to have.

help.requesting.discoverTitle.defaultMessage: The best way to discover media

help.requesting.easyDesc.defaultMessage: Seerr presents you with a request interface that is incredibly easy to understand and use. You can select the exact seasons you want to watch.

help.requesting.easyTitle.defaultMessage: Requesting has never been so easy

help.requesting.info1.defaultMessage: Each individual request is processed the moment it's approved, or in the event it's auto-approved, immediately.

help.requesting.info2.defaultMessage: The time in which it takes to become available on {appTitle} can depend on many factors such as the release date (older media can be more difficult to find), the popularity, and the quality.

help.requesting.info3.defaultMessage: Keep an eye on {seerr}, or watch for the Media Available notification.

help.requesting.info4.defaultMessage: {appTitle} supports multiple types of notifications, all of which can be managed via your notification settings. {channels}

help.requesting.mobileDesc.defaultMessage: Use Seerr as a near-native mobile app by adding it to your home screen. Seerr is designed for use on any screen size.

help.requesting.noQuota.defaultMessage: currently has no request limits configured.

help.requesting.notificationsDesc.defaultMessage: Several notification agents are directly supported, including email, Discord and web push.

help.requesting.quotaDetails.defaultMessage: currently allows for a maximum of {movieLimit} Movie requests{moviePeriod} and a maximum of {tvLimit} Season requests{tvPeriod}, per member.

help.requesting.quotaGeneric.defaultMessage: may have request limits that apply per member.

help.requesting.step2.defaultMessage: Search for any movie or show or locate via discovery

help.requesting.step3.defaultMessage: Open the media discovery page by selecting it

help.requesting.step4.defaultMessage: Select the "Request" option and if relevant select which season(s)

help.requesting.step5.defaultMessage: Once your request has been approved by a moderator, it will begin downloading

help.requesting.unavailableDesc.defaultMessage: Media requests are not currently available on {appTitle}. The Seerr request service has not been configured. Please contact the server admin for more information.

help.statusPageMessage.defaultMessage: Having issues connecting? Check out our {statusLink}

help.terms.cancellation1.defaultMessage: 2.1. You can leave {appTitle} at any time — no hard feelings. Your access will end and your account will be closed.

help.terms.cancellation2.defaultMessage: 2.2. {plexLogo} accounts are managed separately and subject to their own terms and conditions.

help.terms.changesDesc.defaultMessage: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes means you accept the updated terms. We will do our best to keep things reasonable.

help.terms.definition.defaultMessage: As used in these Terms of Use, "{appTitle} service", "our service" or "the service" means the personalized service provided by {appTitle} for discovering and watching content, including all features and functionalities, recommendations, the website, and user interfaces, as well as all content and software associated with our service.

help.terms.membership1.defaultMessage: 1.1 Your {appTitle} membership will continue until terminated. To use the {appTitle} service you need Internet access and a compatible device.

help.terms.membership2.defaultMessage: 1.2 {appTitle} is a personal, non-commercial service. Think of it like being invited to a really great movie night — just, you know, every night.

help.terms.passwordsDesc.defaultMessage: Keep your account credentials safe. You are responsible for all activity on your account. If you suspect unauthorized access, let us know and we will help sort it out.

help.terms.service1.defaultMessage: 3.1. The service is for your personal and non-commercial use only and may not be shared with individuals beyond your household. Please do not use it for public performances — this is not a cinema (though we understand the temptation).

help.terms.service2.defaultMessage: 3.2. Content availability may vary by location. The number of simultaneous streams may be limited by the admin.

help.terms.service3.defaultMessage: 3.3. The content library is regularly updated. We are always working to improve things and keep the shelves stocked.

help.terms.service4.defaultMessage: 3.4. Some content may be available for temporary offline download on supported devices. Limitations apply.

help.terms.service5.defaultMessage: 3.5. Please use {appTitle} responsibly. Do not attempt to circumvent, reverse engineer, or otherwise tamper with the service. Do not use automated tools to access or scrape content. We reserve the right to terminate accounts that violate these terms.

help.terms.service6.defaultMessage: 3.6. Streaming quality depends on your internet connection and device. We recommend at least 3 Mbps for HD content. You are responsible for your own internet costs — we cannot help with your ISP bill, sadly.

help.terms.service7.defaultMessage: 3.7. The {plexLogo} software is subject to its own licenses. Updates may be applied automatically.

help.terms.warrantiesDesc.defaultMessage: The {appTitle} service is provided "as is" and without warranty. We do our best to keep things running smoothly, but the occasional hiccup is inevitable. You waive all special, indirect and consequential damages against us.

help.terms.welcome.defaultMessage: Welcome to {appTitle}! These Terms of Use govern your use of our service. By using {appTitle}, you agree to these terms. They are not meant to be scary — just a few ground rules so everyone can enjoy the service.

help.watchOnTv.airplayBest.defaultMessage: For the best experience, including 4k content, we recommend the latest AppleTV model

help.watchOnTv.airplayStep2.defaultMessage: Tap the Airplay icon at the top of the screen

help.watchOnTv.airplayStep3.defaultMessage: Select the content you wish to view and tap Play

help.watchOnTv.airplayStep4.defaultMessage: Choose the Apple TV you wish to stream to

help.watchOnTv.airplayStep5.defaultMessage: The app will now be cast via Airplay to your TV. The Airplay icon will change colour, letting you know you're connected.

help.watchOnTv.airplayStep6.defaultMessage: The content playing on your device will now show on your TV

help.watchOnTv.airplayTip1.defaultMessage: Ensure the Apple TV is connected to your TV

help.watchOnTv.airplayTip2.defaultMessage: Ensure the iOS device with {appTitle} and the Apple TV are both connected to the same Wi-Fi network

help.watchOnTv.breadcrumb.defaultMessage: How can I watch {appTitle} on my TV?

help.watchOnTv.chromecastBest.defaultMessage: For the best experience, including 4k content, we recommend the latest generation model

help.watchOnTv.chromecastStep2.defaultMessage: Tap the Cast icon at the top of the screen

help.watchOnTv.chromecastStep3.defaultMessage: Select the content you wish to view and tap Play

help.watchOnTv.chromecastStep4.defaultMessage: Choose the device you wish to stream to

help.watchOnTv.chromecastStep5.defaultMessage: The app will now be cast to your TV. The Cast icon will change colour, letting you know you're connected.

help.watchOnTv.chromecastStep6.defaultMessage: The content playing on your device will now show on your TV

help.watchOnTv.chromecastTip1.defaultMessage: Ensure the Google Home app is installed on your mobile device. It's available on both the iTunes Store and Google Play Store

help.watchOnTv.chromecastTip2.defaultMessage: Ensure the Chromecast device is connected to your TV

help.watchOnTv.chromecastTip3.defaultMessage: Ensure the mobile device with {appTitle} and the Chromecast device are both connected to the same Wi-Fi network

help.watchOnTv.heading.defaultMessage: How can I watch {appTitle} on my TV?

help.watchOnTv.plexBest.defaultMessage: For the best experience, including 4k content, we recommend the latest version of {plexLogo}

help.watchOnTv.plexStep1.defaultMessage: Open the {plexLogo} app on your device

help.watchOnTv.plexStep4.defaultMessage: Select the content you wish to view and tap Play

help.watchOnTv.plexTip1.defaultMessage: Ensure the device with {plexLogo} is powered on and connected to Wi-Fi

help.watchOnTv.plexTip3.defaultMessage: Reset and clear the cache of the {plexLogo} app

help.watchOnTv.subheading.defaultMessage: You can use Chromecast or Apple AirPlay to wirelessly stream {appTitle} content from your Android or iOS mobile device to your TV or play directly on some supported devices such as Apple or Google TV with the Plex app

help.watching.heading.defaultMessage: Topics related to using and watching {appTitle}

help.watching.subheading.defaultMessage: If you have questions or are unsure of how to use {appTitle} or make new requests, you can read through these topics.

help.whatIsPlex.description1.defaultMessage: A one-stop destination to stream movies, TV shows, and music, {plexLogo} is the most comprehensive entertainment platform available today. Available on almost any device, {plexLogo2} is the first-and-only streaming platform to offer free ad-supported movies, shows, and live TV together with the ability to easily search—and add to your Watchlist—any title ever made, no matter which streaming service it lives on. Using the platform as their entertainment concierge, 17 million (and growing!) monthly active users count on {plexLogo3} for new discoveries and recommendations from all their favorite streaming apps, personal media libraries, and beyond.

help.whatIsPlex.description2.defaultMessage: If you are streaming only third-party content ({appTitle}, live TV, web shows), then you are good to go as soon as you have an account, just install an app on your phone, Smart TV, computer, or simply open up our web app on your browser!

help.whatIsPlex.description3.defaultMessage: Watch thousands of free, on-demand Movies & Shows streaming service or over 100 channels of live TV. Listen to your favorite podcasts at home or on your commute. Watch your favorite web shows from talented creators around the world. You can even access over 60 million streaming music tracks and videos, provided by TIDAL!

help.whatIsPlex.subheading.defaultMessage: {plexLogo} gives you one place to find and access all the media that matters to you. From personal media on your own server, to free and on-demand Movies & Shows, live TV, podcasts, and web shows, to streaming music, you can enjoy it all in one app, on any device.

help.whatIsStreamarr.aboutDesc.defaultMessage: {appTitle} is built using {streamarr}, an open-source media server management platform. Streamarr provides the tools to manage members, invites, content requests, and more — all wrapped in a modern, user-friendly interface.

help.whatIsStreamarr.description1.defaultMessage: {appTitle} is a free, private, members-only streaming service powered by {plexLogo}. It brings together a curated library of movies, TV shows, and music — all available to stream from anywhere, on almost any device.

help.whatIsStreamarr.description2.defaultMessage: If something isn't already in the library, members can request new content directly through the built-in request system. {appTitle} is designed to be seamless and easy to use — no technical skills required.

help.whatIsStreamarr.featureCalendar.defaultMessage: Browse upcoming releases and track when new episodes or movies are arriving

help.whatIsStreamarr.featureDevices.defaultMessage: Watch on Smart TVs, phones, tablets, computers, streaming sticks, and more

help.whatIsStreamarr.featureDownload.defaultMessage: Download content for offline viewing via the {plexLogo} app

help.whatIsStreamarr.featureNotification.defaultMessage: Get notified when new content becomes available or when your requests are fulfilled

help.whatIsStreamarr.featurePWA.defaultMessage: Install {appTitle} as a web app on your device for quick access

help.whatIsStreamarr.featureRequests.defaultMessage: Request new content through Seerr — if it's not in the library, just ask for it

help.whatIsStreamarr.featureStreaming.defaultMessage: Stream movies, TV shows, and music on-demand from any supported device

help.whatIsStreamarr.getStartedDesc.defaultMessage: Ready to dive in? Here are some helpful resources to get you going:

help.whatIsStreamarr.subheading.defaultMessage: Been wondering to yourself, "what the heck is {appTitle}"? Look no further...

hero.error.emptyCode.defaultMessage: Please enter a valid invite code.

hero.inviteCode.defaultMessage: Enter your invite code to get started

hero.subtitle.defaultMessage: Watch anywhere, anytime for free. The future is now.

imageCache.description.defaultMessage: Streamarr will proxy and cache images from pre-configured external sources. Cached images are saved into your config folder. You can find the files in {cachePath}

imageUpload.dropOrClick.defaultMessage: Drop an image or click to upload

imageUpload.fileTooLarge.defaultMessage: File is too large. Maximum size is 10MB.

inAppNotifications.saveError.defaultMessage: In App notification settings failed to save.

inAppNotifications.testError.defaultMessage: In App test notification failed to send.

index.faqs.howToInstall.answer.defaultMessage: {appTitle} is a Progressive Web App (PWA) that can be installed directly from your browser on any device. Simply visit {appUrl} and use your browser's install option to add it to your home screen. {downloadLink}

index.faqs.howToInstall.question.defaultMessage: How do I install the app?

index.faqs.howToJoin.answer1.defaultMessage: Joining {appTitle} is by invite only. Current active members can invite friends from their profile.

index.faqs.howToJoin.answer1.withQuota.defaultMessage: Joining {appTitle} is by invite only. Current active members can invite up to {limit} friends{days}.

index.faqs.howToJoin.answer2.defaultMessage: To invite a friend, log into your account, go to your profile and select the Invites tab. Share the generated invite code or link with your friend and they can sign up at {appUrl}/signup.

index.faqs.whatIsPlex.answer1.defaultMessage: Plex gives you one place to find and access all the media that matters to you. From personal media on your own server, to free and on-demand Movies & Shows, live TV, podcasts, and web shows, you can enjoy it all in one app, on any device.

index.faqs.whatIsPlex.answer2.defaultMessage: If you are streaming only third-party content ({appTitle}, live TV, web shows), then you are good to go as soon as you have an account, just install an app on your phone, Smart TV, computer, or simply open up our web app on your browser!

index.faqs.whatIsPlex.answer3.defaultMessage: Watch thousands of free, on-demand Movies & Shows or live TV channels. Listen to your favourite podcasts at home or on your commute, and watch popular web shows from creators around the world.

index.faqs.whatIsStreamarr.answer1.defaultMessage: {appTitle} is a free, Plex-powered streaming service that brings all your favourites together in one place. With content spanning Netflix, Disney+, Prime Video, HBO Max, and more — there's always something exciting to watch.

index.faqs.whatIsStreamarr.answer2.defaultMessage: Watch the latest releases, timeless classics, and hidden gems across all your devices. {seerr}{helpLink}

index.faqs.whatToWatch.answer1.defaultMessage: {appTitle} offers an ever-evolving collection of movies, TV shows, and more. From the latest blockbusters and binge-worthy series to timeless classics and nostalgic throwbacks.

index.faqs.whatToWatch.answer2.defaultMessage: New content is added regularly, so there's always something new to discover.

index.faqs.whatToWatch.seerr.defaultMessage: Can't find something? Use Seerr to request almost anything and it'll be available to watch within minutes.

index.faqs.whereToWatch.answer1.defaultMessage: {appTitle} is available anywhere you can use Plex — on mobile devices, web browsers, smart TVs, game consoles, streaming devices, and more. You can also visit {appUrl} directly.

index.faqs.whereToWatch.answer2.defaultMessage: You can also install {appTitle} as an app on your device for quick access. {devicesLink}

index.faqs.whereToWatch.devicesLink.defaultMessage: For a complete list of supported devices, click {link}

index.favourites.subtitle.defaultMessage: An ever evolving collection of the world's most beloved movies and TV shows.

index.favourites.title.defaultMessage: {appTitle} has all your favourites in one place

index.requesting.description.defaultMessage: Request almost any Movie or TV Show and watch it directly on {appTitle} in no time with Seerr. Enjoy Seerr as part of your {appTitle} membership.

index.watching.download.defaultMessage: Download any movie or series and watch on-the-go. *

index.watching.inviteFriends.defaultMessage: Invite some of your closest friends to join the fun.

index.watching.limitExperience.defaultMessage: Limit your experience to {appTitle} or leverage all Plex has to offer.

index.watching.quality.defaultMessage: An ever-growing range of titles in 720p/1080p/4K and Dolby Atmos sound on compatible devices.

index.watching.requestSeerr.defaultMessage: Request anything new, anywhere on the go with the Seerr app.

index.watching.watchTogether.defaultMessage: Host virtual movie nights with Watch Together. Pause, rewind and react with your friends. Both users must be active members.

invite.codeInvalid.defaultMessage: Invite code must only contain letters and numbers.

invite.codeMax.defaultMessage: Invite code must be less than 20 characters

inviteShare.shareDescription.defaultMessage: Share this invite link or QR code with your friends!

jobs.description.defaultMessage: Streamarr performs certain maintenance tasks as regularly-scheduled jobs, but they can also be manually triggered below. Manually running a job will not alter its schedule.

jobs.editError.defaultMessage: Something went wrong while saving the job.

jobs.everyMinutes.defaultMessage: Every {count, plural, one {# minute} other {# minutes}}

jobs.everySeconds.defaultMessage: Every {count, plural, one {# second} other {# seconds}}

localSignup.emailInvalid.defaultMessage: Please enter a valid email address

localSignup.usernameMaxLength.defaultMessage: Username must be less than 20 characters

localSignup.usernameMinLength.defaultMessage: Username must be at least 3 characters

logs.description.defaultMessage: You can also view these logs directly via {stdout}, or in {logPath}

moreHelp.checkHelpSection.defaultMessage: Check out the help section on {plexLogo} or reach out below!

moreHelp.plexHelpDescription.defaultMessage: Take a look at the {plexLogo} Help section or browse their forums for even more assistance.

notFound.quote.defaultMessage: There are places out there you can't find on any map. They're not gone, they're just lost.

notification.inviteExpired.description.defaultMessage: Get notified when an invite you created has expired

notification.inviteUsedSuccessfully.desc.defaultMessage: Get notified when an invite you sent has been successfully redeemed

notification.localMessages.description.defaultMessage: Get notified when you receive a message from Streamarr

notification.newEvent.description.defaultMessage: Get notified when a new Streamarr event is created

notification.newInvite.description.defaultMessage: Get notified when a new invite is created

notification.readAllError.defaultMessage: Error marking all notifications as read

notification.signUpDisabledMessage.defaultMessage: The admin has currently disabled in-app notifications.

notification.userCreated.description.defaultMessage: Get notified when a new user is created

notificationModal.actionUrlInvalid.defaultMessage: Action URL must be a URL or base path starting with /

notificationModal.actionUrlRequired.defaultMessage: Action URL is required when Action URL Title is provided

notificationModal.actionUrlTitleMax.defaultMessage: Action URL Title must not be more than 40 characters

notificationModal.descriptionMax.defaultMessage: Description must not be more than 150 characters

notificationModal.notifyUsersRequired.defaultMessage: At least one user must be selected

notificationModal.saveError.defaultMessage: There was an error saving the notification

notificationModal.subjectMax.defaultMessage: Subject must not be more than 40 characters

plexImport.error.defaultMessage: Something went wrong while importing Plex users.

plexImport.newSignIn.warning.defaultMessage: The Enable New Plex Sign-In setting is currently enabled. Plex users with library access do not need to be imported in order to sign in.

plexImport.noUsers.defaultMessage: No users were imported from Plex.

plexImport.noUsersToImport.defaultMessage: There are no Plex users to import.

plexImport.success.defaultMessage: {count, plural, one {# Plex user} other {# Plex users}} imported successfully!

plexSettings.defaultPivotTip.defaultMessage: The default view when a library is selected

plexSettings.description.defaultMessage: Configure the settings for your Plex server. Streamarr scans your Plex libraries to generate menus and share to invited users.

plexSettings.enablePlaylistsTip.defaultMessage: Show a Playlists menu item and library view option

plexSettings.libraries.description.defaultMessage: The libraries Streamarr will use. Set up and save your Plex connection settings, then click the button below if no libraries are listed.

plexSettings.loadServersPrompt.defaultMessage: Press the button to load available servers

plexSettings.retrieveServersError.defaultMessage: Failed to retrieve Plex server list.

plexSettings.setupInstructions.defaultMessage: To set up Plex, you can either enter the details manually or select a server retrieved from {plexLink}. Press the button to the right of the dropdown to fetch the list of available servers.

plexSettings.somethingWentWrong.defaultMessage: Something went wrong attempting to reconnect.

profile.trialPeriodRestriction.defaultMessage: New invites can be generated after this date

radarrSettings.deleteconfirm.defaultMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this server?

radarrSettings.description.defaultMessage: Configure your Radarr server(s) below. You can connect multiple Radarr servers, but only two of them can be marked as defaults (one non-4K and one 4K). Administrators are able to override the server(s) used to process new events.

radarrSettings.no4kdefault.defaultMessage: A 4K Radarr server must be marked as default in order to enable new 4K Radarr events.

radarrSettings.noDefaultServer.defaultMessage: At least one Radarr server must be marked as default in order for movie events to be processed.

radarrSettings.single4kWarning.defaultMessage: If you only have a single Radarr server for both non-4K and 4K content (or if you only download 4K content), your Radarr server should NOT be designated as a 4K server.

resetPassword.description.defaultMessage: Please enter a new password for your local account.

resetPassword.email.label.defaultMessage: Please enter the email address associated to your Local account.

resetPassword.email.note.defaultMessage: Note that Plex users must reset their password from the {plexLogo} login window.

resetPassword.email.sent.label.defaultMessage: Please check your email to access the reset password link.

resetPassword.email.sent.note.defaultMessage: If you do not receive it, your address may be incorrect or not associated to an existing account.

resetPassword.passwordTooShort.defaultMessage: Password is too short; should be a minimum of 8 characters

serviceUnavailable.timeoutMessage.defaultMessage: Something went wrong. {serviceName} did not respond in time.

serviceUnavailable.unreachableMessage.defaultMessage: Unable to connect to {serviceName}. Service is unreachable.

servicesSettings.authDisabled.tooltip.defaultMessage: To re-enable authentication, change the setting directly in {service}

servicesSettings.bazarr.description.defaultMessage: Optionally configure the settings for your Bazarr server.

servicesSettings.disableAuth.description.defaultMessage: Disables authentication on {service}. You must understand the risks before proceeding. Only do this if {service} is not directly exposed to the internet.

sonarrSettings.single4kWarning.defaultMessage: If you only have a single sonarr server for both non-4K and 4K content (or if you only download 4K content), your Sonarr server should NOT be designated as a 4K server.

userPermissions.manageNotifications.desc.defaultMessage: Grant permission to manage notifications. Users with this permission can edit or remove notifications made by others.

userPermissions.manageUsers.description.defaultMessage: Grant permission to manage users. Users with this permission cannot modify users with or grant the Admin privilege.
